children.heading: Grants
children.label: a Grants
children.text: From funds made available under the Secretary is authorized to make grants to States, from allotments under subsection (b), to carry out the programs and activities of this part.section 6332(a) of this title

children.heading: Distribution based upon fiscal effort and equity
children.label: b Distribution based upon fiscal effort and equity
i
children.text: the amount in for all States other than the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, except that the amount determined under that subparagraph shall not be less that 34 percent or more than 46 percent of the average per pupil expenditure in the United States, and the amount in for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, except that the amount in shall be 34 percent of the average per pupil expenditure in the United States; multiplied bysection 6333(a)(1)(B) of this titlesection 6333(a)(4) of this titlesection 6333(a)(4)(A)(ii) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: such State’s effort factor described in paragraph (2); multiplied by

children.label: iii
children.text: 1.30 minus such State’s equity factor described in paragraph (3).

children.label: i
children.text: 0.35 percent of the total amount reserved under to carry out this section; orsection 6332(a) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: 0.35 percent of the total amount available to carry out this section; and

children.label: II
children.text: 150 percent of the national average grant under this section per child described in , without application of a weighting factor, multiplied by the State’s total number of children described in , without application of a weighting factor.section 6333(c) of this titlesection 6333(c) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the effort factor for a State shall be determined in accordance with the succeeding sentence, except that such factor shall not be less than 0.95 nor greater than 1.05. The effort factor determined under this sentence shall be a fraction the numerator of which is the product of the 3-year average per-pupil expenditure in the State multiplied by the 3-year average per capita income in the United States and the denominator of which is the product of the 3-year average per capita income in such State multiplied by the 3-year average per-pupil expenditure in the United States.

children.heading: Commonwealth of Puerto Rico
children.label: B Commonwealth of Puerto Rico
children.text: The effort factor for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico shall be equal to the lowest effort factor calculated under subparagraph (A) for any State.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the Secretary shall determine the equity factor under this section for each State in accordance with clause (ii).

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: For each State, the Secretary shall compute a weighted coefficient of variation for the per-pupil expenditures of local educational agencies in accordance with subclauses (II), (III), and (IV).

children.heading: Variation
children.label: II Variation
children.text: In computing coefficients of variation, the Secretary shall weigh the variation between per-pupil expenditures in each local educational agency and the average per-pupil expenditures in the State according to the number of pupils served by the local educational agency.

children.heading: Number of pupils
children.label: III Number of pupils
children.text: In determining the number of pupils under this paragraph served by each local educational agency and in each State, the Secretary shall multiply the number of children counted under by a factor of 1.4.section 6333(c) of this title

children.heading: Enrollment requirement
children.label: IV Enrollment requirement
children.text: In computing coefficients of variation, the Secretary shall include only those local educational agencies with an enrollment of more than 200 students.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: B Special rule
children.text: The equity factor for a State that meets the disparity standard described in section 222.162 of title 34, Code of Federal Regulations (as such section was in effect on the day preceding ) or a State with only one local educational agency shall be not greater than 0.10.January 8, 2002

children.heading: Use of funds; eligibility of local educational agencies
children.label: c Use of funds; eligibility of local educational agencies

children.text: the number of children in the local educational agency counted under , before application of the weighted child count described in paragraph (3), is at least 10; andsection 6333(c) of this title1So in original. This subsec. does not contain a par. (3).1

if the number of children counted for grants under , before application of the weighted child count described in paragraph (3), is at least 5 percent of the total number of children aged 5 to 17 years, inclusive, in the school district of the local educational agency.section 6333(c) of this title1

children.heading: Allocation of funds to eligible local educational agencies
children.label: d Allocation of funds to eligible local educational agencies

children.heading: States with an equity factor less than .10
children.label: 1 States with an equity factor less than .10

children.heading: Weights for allocations to counties
children.label: A Weights for allocations to counties

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: For each fiscal year for which the Secretary uses county population data to calculate grants, the weighted child count used to determine a county’s allocation under this section is the larger of the two amounts determined under clauses (ii) and (iii).

children.label: I
children.text: the number of children determined under for that county who constitute not more than 15.00 percent, inclusive, of the county’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 15.00 percent, but not more than 19.00 percent, of such population, multiplied by 1.75;

children.label: III
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 19.00 percent, but not more than 24.20 percent, of such population, multiplied by 2.5;

children.label: IV
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 24.20 percent, but not more than 29.20 percent, of such population, multiplied by 3.25; and

children.label: V
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 29.20 percent of such population, multiplied by 4.0.

children.label: I
children.text: the number of children determined under who constitute not more than 2,311, inclusive, of the county’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the number of such children between 2,312 and 7,913, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 1.5;

children.label: III
children.text: the number of such children between 7,914 and 23,917, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.0;

children.label: IV
children.text: the number of such children between 23,918 and 93,810, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.5; and

children.label: V
children.text: the number of such children in excess of 93,811 in such population, multiplied by 3.0.

children.heading: Weights for allocations to local educational agencies
children.label: B Weights for allocations to local educational agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: For each fiscal year for which the Secretary uses local educational agency data, the weighted child count used to determine a local educational agency’s grant under this section is the larger of the two amounts determined under clauses (ii) and (iii).

children.label: I
children.text: the number of children determined under for that local educational agency who constitute not more than 15.58 percent, inclusive, of the agency’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 15.58 percent, but not more than 22.11 percent, of such population, multiplied by 1.75;

children.label: III
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 22.11 percent, but not more than 30.16 percent, of such population, multiplied by 2.5;

children.label: IV
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 30.16 percent, but not more than 38.24 percent, of such population, multiplied by 3.25; and

children.label: V
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 38.24 percent of such population, multiplied by 4.0.

children.label: I
children.text: the number of children determined under who constitute not more than 691, inclusive, of the agency’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the number of such children between 692 and 2,262, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 1.5;

children.label: III
children.text: the number of such children between 2,263 and 7,851, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.0;

children.label: IV
children.text: the number of such children between 7,852 and 35,514, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.5; and

children.label: V
children.text: the number of such children in excess of 35,514 in such population, multiplied by 3.0.

children.heading: States with an equity factor greater than or equal to .10 and less than .20
children.label: 2 States with an equity factor greater than or equal to .10 and less than .20

children.label: A Weights for allocations to counties

children.label: II

children.label: III

children.label: 3 States with an equity factor greater than or equal to .20

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A State is entitled to receive its full allotment of funds under this section for any fiscal year if the Secretary finds that the State’s fiscal effort per student or the aggregate expenditures of the State with respect to the provision of free public education by the State for the preceding fiscal year was not less than 90 percent of the fiscal effort or aggregate expenditures for the second preceding fiscal year, subject to the requirements of paragraph (2).

children.heading: Reduction in case of failure to meet
children.label: 2 Reduction in case of failure to meet

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall reduce the amount of the allotment of funds under this section for any fiscal year in the exact proportion by which a State fails to meet the requirement of paragraph (1) by falling below 90 percent of both the fiscal effort per student and aggregate expenditures (using the measure most favorable to the State), if such State has also failed to meet such requirement (as determined using the measure most favorable to the State) for 1 or more of the 5 immediately preceding fiscal years.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: B Special rule
children.text: No such lesser amount shall be used for computing the effort required under paragraph (1) for subsequent years.

children.label: A
children.text: exceptional or uncontrollable circumstances, such as a natural disaster or a change in the organizational structure of the State; or

children.label: B
children.text: a precipitous decline in the financial resources of the State.

children.heading: Adjustments where necessitated by appropriations
children.label: f Adjustments where necessitated by appropriations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If the sums available under this section for any fiscal year are insufficient to pay the full amounts that all local educational agencies in States are eligible to receive to carry out this section for such year, the Secretary shall ratably reduce the allocations to such local educational agencies, subject to paragraphs (2) and (3).

children.heading: Additional funds
children.label: 2 Additional funds
children.text: If additional funds become available for making payments under this section for such fiscal year, allocations that were reduced under paragraph (1) shall be increased on the same basis as they were reduced.

children.label: A
children.text: not less than 95 percent of the amount made available for the preceding fiscal year if the number of children counted for grants under is not less than 30 percent of the total number of children aged 5 to 17 years, inclusive, in the local educational agency;section 6333 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: not less than 90 percent of the amount made available for the preceding fiscal year if the percentage described in subparagraph (A) is between 15 percent and 30 percent; and

children.label: C
children.text: not less than 85 percent of the amount made available for the preceding fiscal year if the percentage described in subparagraph (A) is below 15 percent.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: 4 Applicability
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary shall not take into consideration the hold-harmless provisions of this subsection for any fiscal year for purposes of calculating State or local allocations for the fiscal year under any program administered by the Secretary other than a program authorized under this part.
